fmiModelDescription.generationTool: Dymola Version 2019 FD01 (64-bit), 2018-10-10 (requires license to execute)

Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.allowFlowReversal1
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.computeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.from_dp1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.dp1_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.linearizeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.deltaM1
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.computeFlowResistance2
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[3]

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[4]

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[5]

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.per.TRef
ScalarVariable.description: Reference temperature used to normalize the inlet temperature variables

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.Q_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small value for heat flow rate or power, used to avoid division by zero

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.HLR
ScalarVariable.description: Heating load ratio

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.CLR
ScalarVariable.description: Cooling load ratio

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.CLR = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 0 else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.A1[1]*heaPum.equFit.x1[1]+heaPum.equFit.A1[2]*heaPum.equFit.x1[2]+heaPum.equFit.A1[3]*heaPum.equFit.x1[3]+heaPum.equFit.A1[4]*heaPum.equFit.x1[4]+heaPum.equFit.A1[5]*heaPum.equFit.x1[5] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.P_HD
ScalarVariable.description: Power Ratio in heating dominanat mode

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.P_CD
ScalarVariable.description: Power Ratio in cooling dominant mode

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.P_CD = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 0 else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.A2[1]*heaPum.equFit.x2[1]+heaPum.equFit.A2[2]*heaPum.equFit.x2[2]+heaPum.equFit.A2[3]*heaPum.equFit.x2[3]+heaPum.equFit.A2[4]*heaPum.equFit.x2[4]+heaPum.equFit.A2[5]*heaPum.equFit.x2[5] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QCon_flow_ava
ScalarVariable.description: Heating capacity available at the condender

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QEva_flow_ava
ScalarVariable.description: Cooling capacity available at the Evaporator

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.QEva_flow_ava = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 0 else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.CLR*heaPum.equFit.per.QEva_heatflow_nominal else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TEvaSet
ScalarVariable.description: Set point for leaving chilled water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TConSet
ScalarVariable.description: Set point for leaving heating water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.uMod
ScalarVariable.description: Heating mode= 1, Off=0, Cooling mode=-1

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.uMod = heaPum.uMod = (if heaPumMod.y > 0 then integer(floor(0.5+heaPumMod.y)) else integer(ceil(heaPumMod.y-0.5)));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QCon
ScalarVariable.description: Condenser heat flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QEva
ScalarVariable.description: Evaporator heat flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.P
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.P = heaPum.P = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.P_HD*heaPum.equFit.per.PCon_nominal_HD else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.P_CD*heaPum.equFit.per.PEva_nominal_CD else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TConLvg
ScalarVariable.description: Condenser leaving water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TConEnt
ScalarVariable.description: Condenser entering water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TEvaLvg
ScalarVariable.description: Evaporator leaving water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.TEvaEnt
ScalarVariable.description: Evaporator entering water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.m1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Volume 1 massflow rate

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.m2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Volume2 mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QConFloSet
ScalarVariable.description: Condenser setpoint heat flow rate

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.QConFloSet = smooth(1, smooth(1, (if noEvent(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small > heaPum.Q_flow_small/10) then 1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow) else (if noEvent(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small < -heaPum.Q_flow_small/10) then heaPum.Q_flow_small else (if heaPum.Q_flow_small/10 > 0 then 2.5*((1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small)*((10*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small)/heaPum.Q_flow_small)^2-3)*(heaPum.Q_flow_small-1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)))/heaPum.Q_flow_small+0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)+heaPum.Q_flow_small) else 0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)+heaPum.Q_flow_small))))));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.QEvaFloSet
ScalarVariable.description: Evaporator setpoint heat flow rate

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.QEvaFloSet = smooth(1, smooth(1, (if noEvent( -(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)) > heaPum.Q_flow_small/100) then 1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow) else (if noEvent( -(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)) < -heaPum.Q_flow_small/100) then -heaPum.Q_flow_small else (if heaPum.Q_flow_small/100 > 0 then 25.0*((heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow))*((100*(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow))/heaPum.Q_flow_small)^2-3)*(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)))/heaPum.Q_flow_small+0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small) else 0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small))))));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A1[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Thermal load ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A1[1] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.HLRC[1] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.CLRC[1] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A1[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Thermal load ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A1[2] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.HLRC[2] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.CLRC[2] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A1[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Thermal load ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A1[3] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.HLRC[3] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.CLRC[3] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A1[4]
ScalarVariable.description: Thermal load ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A1[4] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.HLRC[4] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.CLRC[4] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A1[5]
ScalarVariable.description: Thermal load ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A1[5] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.HLRC[5] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.CLRC[5] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x1[1]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x1[1] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.0 else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.0 else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x1[2]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x1[2] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.TConEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.TConEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x1[3]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x1[3] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.TEvaEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.TEvaEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x1[4]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x1[4] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mCon_flow_nominal else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mCon_flow_nominal else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x1[5]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x1[5] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mEva_flow_nominal else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mEva_flow_nominal else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A2[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A2[1] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_HDC[1] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[1] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A2[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A2[2] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_HDC[2] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[2] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A2[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A2[3] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_HDC[3] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[3] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A2[4]
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A2[4] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_HDC[4] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[4] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.A2[5]
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor power ratio coefficients

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.A2[5] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_HDC[5] else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.per.P_CDC[5] else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x2[1]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x2[1] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.0 else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.0 else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x2[2]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x2[2] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.TConEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.TConEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x2[3]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x2[3] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.TEvaEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.TEvaEnt/heaPum.equFit.per.TRef else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x2[4]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x2[4] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mCon_flow_nominal else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mCon_flow_nominal else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.equFit.x2[5]
ScalarVariable.description: normalized inlet variables

Data.equation: heaPum.equFit.x2[5] = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mEva_flow_nominal else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then 1.893/heaPum.equFit.per.mEva_flow_nominal else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.uMod
ScalarVariable.description: HeatPump control input signal,Heating mode= 1, Off=0, Cooling mode=-1

Data.equation: heaPum.uMod = (if heaPumMod.y > 0 then integer(floor(0.5+heaPumMod.y)) else integer(ceil(heaPumMod.y-0.5)));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.preHeaFloCon.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.preHeaFloCon.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.preHeaFloEva.port.T
ScalarVariable.description: Port temperature

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.preHeaFloEva.port.Q_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat flow rate (positive if flowing from outside into the component)

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.QConFloSet.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

Data.equation: heaPum.QConFloSet.y = heaPum.equFit.QConFloSet = smooth(1, smooth(1, (if noEvent(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small > heaPum.Q_flow_small/10) then 1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow) else (if noEvent(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small < -heaPum.Q_flow_small/10) then heaPum.Q_flow_small else (if heaPum.Q_flow_small/10 > 0 then 2.5*((1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small)*((10*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small)/heaPum.Q_flow_small)^2-3)*(heaPum.Q_flow_small-1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)))/heaPum.Q_flow_small+0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)+heaPum.Q_flow_small) else 0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hConSet-conPum.ports[1].h_outflow)+heaPum.Q_flow_small))))));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.QEvaFloSet.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

Data.equation: heaPum.QEvaFloSet.y = heaPum.equFit.QEvaFloSet = smooth(1, smooth(1, (if noEvent( -(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)) > heaPum.Q_flow_small/100) then 1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow) else (if noEvent( -(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)) < -heaPum.Q_flow_small/100) then -heaPum.Q_flow_small else (if heaPum.Q_flow_small/100 > 0 then 25.0*((heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow))*((100*(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow))/heaPum.Q_flow_small)^2-3)*(heaPum.Q_flow_small+1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)))/heaPum.Q_flow_small+0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small) else 0.5*(1.893*(heaPum.hEvaSet-evaPum.ports[1].h_outflow)-heaPum.Q_flow_small))))));

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.TConEnt.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.TEvaEnt.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.TConLvg.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.TEvaLvg.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.mConFlo.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.mEvaFlo.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: heaPum.P
ScalarVariable.description: Compressor Power

Data.equation: heaPum.P = (if heaPum.uMod == 1 then heaPum.equFit.P_HD*heaPum.equFit.per.PCon_nominal_HD else (if heaPum.uMod == -1 then heaPum.equFit.P_CD*heaPum.equFit.per.PEva_nominal_CD else 0));

ScalarVariable.name: res1.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: res1.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: res1.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: res1.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: res1.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: res1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: res1.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: res1.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: res1.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: res1.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: res1.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: res1.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: res1.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal mass flow rate where transition to turbulent occurs

ScalarVariable.name: res1.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.offset
ScalarVariable.description: Offset of output signal

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.startTime
ScalarVariable.description: Output = offset for time < startTime

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.timeScale
ScalarVariable.description: Time scale of first table column

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.a
ScalarVariable.description: Interpolation coefficients a of actual interval (y=a*x+b)

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.b
ScalarVariable.description: Interpolation coefficients b of actual interval (y=a*x+b)

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.last
ScalarVariable.description: Last used lower grid index

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.nextEvent
ScalarVariable.description: Next event instant

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.nextEventScaled
ScalarVariable.description: Next scaled event instant

ScalarVariable.name: ComP.timeScaled
ScalarVariable.description: Scaled time

ScalarVariable.name: reaToInt.u
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real input signal

ScalarVariable.name: reaToInt.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Integer output signal

Data.equation: reaToInt.y = heaPum.uMod = (if heaPumMod.y > 0 then integer(floor(0.5+heaPumMod.y)) else integer(ceil(heaPumMod.y-0.5)));
